## Event-to-Action Cheatsheet

1. High paywall views + low CTA -> Improve placement relevance and copy.
2. High CTA + low purchase -> Reduce purchase friction and review pricing presentation.
3. High superset blocked events -> Add contextual Pro upsell at intent moment.
4. Low first-workout completion -> Shorten onboarding and reduce setup friction.
5. Crash concentration on one screen -> Prioritize reliability fix before feature work.

## Weekly Commitments

- Keep one primary KPI owner.
- Run one major funnel experiment per week.
- If crash-free rate is below target, reliability takes priority.
